summary: The CI job failed with exit code 2 from 'make test.ci'. The test suite for the push package passed (97.2% coverage), but the overall make target reported FAIL, indicating at least one other test package or suite failed outside the visible passing log window.
root_cause: The make target 'test.ci' exited with error code 1 (propagated as exit code 2 to the CI runner), indicating at least one test suite reported FAIL. The visible log shows the push package passed, but the bare 'FAIL' line immediately after 'ok github.com/redis/go-redis/v9/push' suggests a different package or the overall test run reported failure.

evidence.reason: A bare FAIL line appears immediately after the push package passed, indicating the overall test run or another package failed
The make target test.ci exited with error code 1, confirming the overall test run failed
The CI job itself exited with code 2, confirming the job-level failure
The push package passed successfully, so the failure is in a different package not shown in this log slice

suggested_fix: Inspect the full CI log output before the push package results to find which package(s) emitted a FAIL line — the failing test and assertion mismatch will be visible there.

model_info._backfill_note: Pre-Codex-2026-05-14 F2 fix. The Claude shim now persists _model_info from every API call; this row predates that emit so resolved_model and usage are not recoverable. requested_model is set to the shim-level alias (haiku for v1, sonnet for v2) which is what the post-fix shim emits.
